age_pfs.result_summary: Linear regression PFS ~ age_years (n=50000): slope=0.1699 months/year (SE=0.0007), p=0.

female_pfs.result_summary: Female (n=22371) mean PFS=3.319 mo; male (n=27629) mean PFS=3.523 mo; diff=-0.204, t-test p=7.7e-25.

ecog_pfs.result_summary: PFS ~ ecog_ps (continuous 0/1/2): slope=-1.0992 mo/level (SE=0.0139), p=0; mean PFS by ECOG: 0=4.33, 1=3.19, 2=2.15.

stage_iv_pfs.result_summary: Stage IV (n=32365) PFS=2.925 mo; non-stage-IV (n=17635) PFS=4.362 mo; diff=-1.438, p=0.

brain_mets_pfs.result_summary: Brain mets (n=12584) PFS=2.743 mo; none (n=37416) PFS=3.663 mo; diff=-0.921, p=0.

adeno_pfs.result_summary: Adenocarcinoma (n=36099) PFS=3.670 mo; squamous (n=13901) PFS=2.813 mo; diff=0.857, p=0.

smoking_pfs_anova.result_summary: ANOVA PFS by smoking_status: never (n=7459, mean=3.675), former (n=27567, mean=3.607), current (n=14974, mean=2.987); F=432.995, p=3.65e-187. Effect estimate is current minus never.

egfr_mutation_pfs.result_summary: egfr_mutation=1 (n=6517) PFS=3.596 mo; egfr_mutation=0 (n=43483) PFS=3.407 mo; diff=0.189, p=6.48e-11.
